text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
34 
EGWP_INDICATOR 
LABEL: 
Employer Group Waiver Plan (EGWP) Indicator 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the Part D plan benefit package is an employer group waiver plan 
(EGWP). 
EGWP plan are not open to general enrollment but rather are offered to beneficiaries through an 
employer group. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: EGWP_INDICATOR 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS
